parameters.text:
You are a precise timetable parser. Extract ALL class/session entries from this timetable.

DETECTION RULES:
1. Identify table structure: determine which axis shows days (Mon-Sun) and which shows time slots.
2. Handle both formats:
   - Grid tables: days as columns, times as rows (or vice versa)
   - List formats: lines like "Monday 10:00-12:00 Mathematics"
3. Extract ALL sessions, including those in merged cells or spanning multiple hours.
4. If multiple sessions appear in one cell, split them into separate entries.

TIME HANDLING:
- Accept 12-hour (8am, 2:30pm) or 24-hour (08:00, 14:30) formats
- Convert ALL times to 24-hour format HH:MM (e.g., 08:00, 14:30)
- If end time is missing or unclear, estimate as start time + 1 hour
- For sessions spanning multiple slots, use the full start-end range

DAY ABBREVIATIONS:
- Use exactly: Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat, Sun
- Map Monday→Mon, Tuesday→Tue, etc.

CONTENT EXTRACTION:
- title: Subject name and lecturer if visible (e.g., "Mathematics - Dr. Smith")
- location: Room/building if visible (e.g., "Room 301", "Building A")
- Ignore: semester dates, week numbers, holidays - extract only recurring weekly schedule

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Return ONLY a raw JSON array. No markdown, no code blocks, no explanation:
[{"day":"Mon","start":"08:00","end":"10:00","title":"Subject Name","location":"Room 301"}]

If no entries found, return: []

messages.content:
={{ 'You are a precise timetable parser. Extract ALL class/session entries from this timetable text.

DETECTION RULES:
1. Look for patterns with a day name + time range + subject.
2. Handle both grid and list formats.
3. Extract ALL sessions found.

TIME HANDLING:
- Accept 12-hour (8am, 2:30pm) or 24-hour (08:00, 14:30) formats
- Convert ALL times to 24-hour HH:MM (e.g., 08:00, 14:30)
- If end time is missing, estimate start + 1 hour

DAY ABBREVIATIONS: Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat, Sun

CONTENT:
- title: subject name + lecturer if visible
- location: room/building if visible
- Ignore semester dates, week numbers, holidays

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Return ONLY a raw JSON array, no markdown, no explanation:
[{"day":"Mon","start":"08:00","end":"10:00","title":"Subject","location":"Room"}]

If no entries found, return: []

--- TIMETABLE TEXT ---
' + $json.text.trim() }}
